title: Complete SBOM dependency graph

sources.reason: Parse multiline pip-compile via metadata into SBOM dependency edges.
Regression coverage for multiline via and dependency graph completeness.

riskAssessment.reason: Dependency edges are release evidence and must not silently omit lockfile provenance.

executionDecision.reason: The parser and graph behavior are bounded by existing SBOM fixtures and assertions.

preReviewWarnings: Verify direct dependency detection, multiline via continuation parsing, and dependsOn completeness.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The Work Item Contract is updated for the actual task.
The new feature is implemented according to requirements.
Unit tests are added to verify the new feature.
User documentation or comments are updated.
guidelines: Dependency graph edges must be evidence-backed by lockfile via metadata.
Keep direct dependency semantics aligned with requirements-dev.in.

intent.problem: pip-compile emits multiline # via blocks that the parser currently drops, so SBOM dependency edges can be incomplete.
constraints: Preserve existing CycloneDX identity and hash semantics.
Do not infer edges from package order; use explicit via metadata.
intent.rationale: Normalize both inline and multiline pip-compile via records before building dependency edges.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized full automated execution of review remediation work items.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
